description: A passenger with an existing cruise booking wants to upgrade from an interior cabin to a balcony cabin.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the passenger's booking and check for available balcony cabins.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an available balcony cabin on the same deck.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the price difference for the upgrade.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the correct cost to upgrade.

nodes.task_description: Process the cabin upgrade, collect the additional payment, and issue an updated booking confirmation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully upgrades the cabin and confirms the change with the passenger.
